title: Create a server file (src/index.js) that imports Express, defines a GET /health endpoint returning {"status":"Ok"} with HTTP 200 and Content-Type application/json, and starts the server listening on process.env.PORT or 5000.
description: Create a server file (src/index.js) that imports Express, defines a GET /health endpoint returning {"status":"Ok"} with HTTP 200 and Content-Type application/json, and starts the server listening on process.env.PORT or 5000.

title: Create a file src/db.js that establishes a MongoDB connection using the connection string from process.env.MONGODB_URI (error handling for missing variable is optional).
description: Create a file src/db.js that establishes a MongoDB connection using the connection string from process.env.MONGODB_URI (error handling for missing variable is optional).
